request.description: Whether to launch a new process or attach to an existing one

taskArgs.description: Arguments passed to the Mix task

projectDir.description: Absolute path to the directory containing `mix.exs`

startApps.description: Run `mix app.start` before the debugger (default: false)

requireFiles.description: Extra `.exs` files to require and interpret before debugging

excludeModules.description: Modules that should NOT be interpreted (e.g. NIFs)

debugAutoInterpretAllModules.description: Automatically interpret all loaded modules (default: true)

debugInterpretModulesPatterns.description: Glob patterns for modules to interpret

exitAfterTaskReturns.description: End the debug session when the task returns (default: true)

env.description: Environment variables to set for the debugged process

noDebug.description: Run the Mix task without debugging (default: false)
